metadata.name: Asoloth
metadata.author: You find yourself in a wild land, armed with only a few heavy sticks, some river rocks, and a few spells. Where you go now? What horrors wait for you in the wilds?
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Elderdale to break the spell.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Elderdale
towns.description: A bustling market town where traders from distant lands hawk exotic wares.

key_dungeons.name: Burning Sanctum
key_dungeons.description: A narrow crevice leads into Burning Sanctum. The sound of dripping water echoes endlessly below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Burning Sanctum for the hidden Silver Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
